chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-775 of 2023 (Ghulam Rasool & others Vs. SHO PS Dadloi) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on MA No. 6478/2023 (Ex./A) 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of MA No. 6479/2023 (Stay) 22-01-2024. Mr. Khan Muhammad Sangi, advocate for the applicants. Mr. Wazeer Ahmed Ghoto, advocate for the private respondent. Mr. Zulfiquar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General. ******** 1. Deferred. 2 & 3. The applicant by way of instant Crl. Misc. Application u/s 561-A Cr.P.C has impugned order dated 23-10-2023 passed by learned Additional Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Pano Aqil, whereby he has directed the police to record statement of the private respondent for purpose of FIR against the applicants and others. Apparently, some of the injuries sustained by the injured are cognizable in nature. The registration of an FIR of a cognizable offence could not be prevented under any circumstance. No illegality is noticed even otherwise in the impugned order, which may justify this Court to make interference with the same by way of instant Crl. Misc. Application, it is dismissed accordingly. Judge Nasim/P.A 2
